title: Economy
description: Datapack based economy & banking system inspired by Origin Realms
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8981bb38d8b0b622c1f3db3777b5d609b41a58.png)

This Data Pack adds a simple **Economics & Banking** feature that lets players deposit and withdraw the in-game currency Rubies.

|Command|Permission|Description|
|-|-|-|
|/function economy:**give** {count:64}|Operator|Provides the user with Rubies, the foundation of the economy.|
|/trigger **deposit** set 64|Everyone|Deposits any amount of Rubies to the bank.|
|/trigger **withdraw** set 64|Everyone|Withdraws any amount of Rubies from the bank.|

**All featured Assets are either from or inspired by [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/blog)**
